title: macro-economist findings/v1
description: Structured economic-release analysis emitted by the macro-economist persona. Pure judgment — outcomes[].p ARE the persona's stated probabilities (no statistical backbone). Each outcome fans out onto one binary belief (design §9/§13).

outcomes.description: Per bracket the market trades, the judged probability the print lands in/above it.

p.description: The persona's judged probability for this outcome.

regime.description: Short phrase naming the macro regime.

key_risk.description: The single most important component or dynamic that could make the print surprise.
